purpose: Machine-readable WellFit PR Post-Creation Mergeability Guard. For the single_agent_docs_register_build stage, an agent may create a PR handoff for allowed docs/register/validator governance work and must inspect/report the PR URL/number, branch, mergeability, required checks, changed files, protected paths, auto-merge eligibility, auto-repair decision, PR review policy, task/work-log evidence, and next action before stopping. This policy still never merges, approves, deploys, changes repository settings, closes PR #13, modifies Unity files, or performs unrestricted auto-repair.

requiredPostPRChecks.label: PR URL / number exists
requiredPostPRChecks.requiredEvidence: PR report includes a GitHub PR URL and/or PR number after creation.

requiredPostPRChecks.label: PR branch is not main
requiredPostPRChecks.requiredEvidence: PR report names the source branch and confirms it is not main.

requiredPostPRChecks.label: PR mergeability was inspected after creation
requiredPostPRChecks.requiredEvidence: Post-creation report records GitHub mergeability state, including unknown/pending if GitHub has not calculated it yet.

requiredPostPRChecks.label: Required workflow/check status was inspected after creation
requiredPostPRChecks.requiredEvidence: Post-creation report records required workflow/check states using checkStatusStates.

requiredPostPRChecks.label: Changed files are listed
requiredPostPRChecks.requiredEvidence: PR description or post-creation report lists changed files or a complete summarized file list.

requiredPostPRChecks.label: Protected paths are checked
requiredPostPRChecks.requiredEvidence: Report confirms protected paths/topics are untouched or stops for human review when touched.

requiredPostPRChecks.label: Auto-merge eligibility was reported
requiredPostPRChecks.requiredEvidence: Report-only AUTO_MERGE_ELIGIBLE=true/false result is included and is not treated as merge approval.

requiredPostPRChecks.label: Auto-repair decision was reported
requiredPostPRChecks.requiredEvidence: Report-only AUTO_REPAIR_ALLOWED=true/false result is included and is not treated as repair authorization unless separately allowed by policy and human/session rules.

requiredPostPRChecks.label: Task status/work-log entry is present or explicitly deferred
requiredPostPRChecks.requiredEvidence: Report names the progress-log/work-log entry or states why it is deferred.

requiredPostPRChecks.label: Next recommended action is stated
requiredPostPRChecks.requiredEvidence: Report states mergeable/green handoff, safe docs/register repair guidance, replacement-PR strategy, or human-review stop.

requiredPostPRChecks.label: PR Diff Review Report is available
requiredPostPRChecks.requiredEvidence: Post-creation report or PR handoff includes PR_DIFF_REVIEW_READY=true/false and summarizes protected path/topic, classification, cross-reference, readiness, inventory, task-status, auto-merge, and auto-repair findings from scripts/wellfit-dev-agent/output/pr-diff-review-report.md.

replacementPRRules.oldPRClosureRule: Old PR should be closed only after the replacement PR is mergeable or human-approved.

stopForHumanReviewRules: mergeability or check failure touches runtime product code or protected paths
failure touches app/**, components/**, lib/**, functions/**, firestore.rules, public/**, package manifests, firebase.json, .github/**, native/unity/**, or native/unity/WellFitBuddyAR/**
failure touches token/NFT/wallet/payment/betting/economy authority, reward authority, mission completion authority, health, child, location, privacy, legal, or compliance areas
repair would require product, legal, compliance, data-protection, security, reward-authority, or source-of-truth judgment
PR #13 or Unity files are involved
required checks fail for reasons not classified as allowed docs/register metadata repair
GitHub mergeability remains unknown after reasonable retry/reporting window
requiredEvidence: report-only PR Diff Review Report result from scripts/wellfit-dev-agent/src/pr-diff-review-report.mjs

interactionWithPRDiffReviewPolicy.requiredUse: Use the PR Diff Review Report as changed-file/protected-impact evidence after PR creation; it does not approve, merge, repair, deploy, or replace human review.
